title: One Broken Script Away (OBSA)
description: This modpack is based on The Broken Script and this modpack adds QoL mods and other cool mods to make your experience better
body:
Welcome to a modpack where things don't quite follow the script... literally.

This is a strange, eerie, and slightly cursed journey into a world where Minecraft’s reality is bending. Built around the Broken Script mod, this pack mixes unsettling atmosphere, creepy encounters, and quality of life tweaks to keep things playable—but just barely. Dialogue breaks. Entities glitch. Logic fails. And sometimes, the game seems to respond to you in ways it shouldn't.

Alongside the main theme, you’ll find mods that enhance visuals, controls, and survival elements, keeping things immersive and manageable—until it isn't. Whether you're here for the horror vibes, the bizarre events, or just to see what "Sybau" really means... good luck.

You’ll need it.

And don't forget that chaos is only one broken script away.
Mods:
Just Enough Items
Balm
3D Skin Layers
AppleSkin
Cloth Config API
Day Counter (Original) for 1.16 - 1.21.5!
Dynamic Crosshair
Dynamic Lights
Essential Mod
FallingTree
Fzzy Config
Geckolib
Iceberg
Iris Shaders
Jade 🔍
Kotlin for Forge
Legendary Tooltips
Macaw's Bridges
Motschen's Better Leaves
Prism
Resourcify
Simple Voice Chat
Sodium
Sound Physics Remastered
TerraBlender
Waystones
and ofc The Broken Script

Shaders:
Complementary Shaders - Reimagined
Photon Shaders

Credit: Eesti Ees (Emil) and Coffee (blud doesnt want his name here)
